retrieved_result: Can you schedule an Uber ahead of time? How do you do this? Can I set the pickup time in advance? Kumar Thangudu, Growth Consultant | Engineer | YC Alum | Blockchain Student Answered May 9, 2015 · Author has 143 answers and 1.2m answer views No. You could, but UBER chose to do subpar incentivization design of their API. Unfortunately, UBER's current API offering doesnt allow 3rd parties any sort
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses scheduling an Uber API and does not relate to Docker setup for beginners.
